FBref — 2026 FIFA World Cup — Squad Standard & Advanced Stats (raw)
Top xG (expected goals): Mbappe 4.8 xG / 5 goals (FRA), Vinicius Jr 3.9 xG / 3 (BRA), Kane 3.6 xG / 4 (ENG), Messi 3.1 xG / 2 (ARG).
Team xG for/against: France 9.2 / 2.1, Brazil 8.7 / 3.0, Spain 7.9 / 2.8, Argentina 7.1 / 3.4.
Possession-adjusted: Spain 64% avg possession, 612 progressive passes; Argentina pressing intensity PPDA 9.1.
Shot-creating actions per90: Bellingham 5.2, Pedri 4.8, Yamal 4.6. Goalkeeping: post-shot xG +/- Donnarumma +2.1, Martinez +1.7.
Note: xG suggests France & Brazil overperforming finishing; Argentina underperforming xG by ~1.1 goals.
